rationale: Gov't Code §2306.1071 is purely definitional for the Texas First-Time Homebuyer Program. It contains no reference to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount or any operative provision affected by the proposed increase.
quote: "Home" means a dwelling in this state in which a first-time homebuyer intends to reside as the homebuyer's principal residence.
_note: No cross-reference to Tax Code §11.13 or homestead exemption amounts found in this definitions section.
